chat.heading: AI Marketing Strategist
chat.subtitle: Ask about your services, orders, or anything marketing — SEO, content, social, web.
chat.offlineNotice: The AI Strategist isn't switched on yet — it's coming soon. In the meantime, use {link} and our team will get back to you by email within one business day.
chat.offlineNoticeLink: the quick actions on your dashboard
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm your marketing strategist. I can see your services, orders and files, and I know the Lao and Southeast Asian market.
chat.greetingTry: Try: “What should my next marketing step be?” or “Explain my last order.”
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again.
chat.footerNote: The strategist can see only your own account. For changes to orders or services, use your dashboard's quick actions.
